name: search-input
title: Search Input
description: Search field with clear control, icon placement, and hover border.

api.description: Search field with clear control, sizes, icon placement, and Input hover border controls. SearchBar is an alias.

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Side for the leading search icon.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Override or hide the default search icon.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Custom trailing slot beside clear when present.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear control when the field has a value.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the clear control is activated.

props.name: hoverBorder
props.description: Forwards to Input. Omit to inherit the theme. Set false to keep the resting border. Set true to force the hover border on.

props.name: hoverBorderColor
props.description: Forwards to Input. Hover border color when hover is active. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground). Sets --df-input-hover-border.

props.name: inputClassName
props.description: Classes on the inner input element.

props.name: className
props.description: Classes on the outer search shell.

props.name: …input attributes
props.description: value, placeholder, onChange, disabled, aria-label, etc.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-hover-border
props.description: Theme field hover border. on paints the ink hover border; off keeps the resting border. Runtime gating uses data-df-hover-border on html. Set with df-ui init --hover-border. Default on.

props.name: --df-input-hover-border
props.description: Hover border on the inner Input when the theme or instance enables hover. Defaults to the ink foreground. Override with hoverBorderColor.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for padding and gap.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
